message:
chore: update Cargo.lock (rayon added to frankensearch-fusion)

Lockfile refresh picking up rayon as a new dependency of the
frankensearch-fusion crate, which is used transitively by the
search infrastructure. This likely reflects upstream changes in
frankensearch that parallelize fusion scoring with rayon for
better throughput on multi-core machines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
